intro.label: // 01 — about me
intro.bio: I'm Moris, a student at BSZ Leonberg and starting October, a dual student at DHBW with SV Informatik GmbH. At the same time, I've been ski racing since I was three years old and compete with the Ski Team Seibelseckle in the German Ski League.

skiingSummary.label: // 02 — ski racing
skiingSummary.desc: On skis since the age of 2. Now an active racer in Ski Team Seibelseckle and, with them, a two-time silver medalist in the German Ski League.

codingSummary.label: // 03 — projects
codingSummary.desc: From event management platforms in PHP to interactive applicant tests and AI-powered blackjack algorithms – I develop digital solutions out of passion.

contact.label: // 04 — contact
contact.subtext: Open for projects, collaboration and new challenges.

form.successDesc: I'll get back to you soon.
form.errorNetwork: Network error. Please try again later.

projects.label: // projects
projects.subtext: Full-stack web applications, AI experiments and more.

abiball.title: Prom Portal
abiball.desc: Comprehensive event management system specifically built for prom planning. Features a secure PHP backend with user authentication, ticket distribution, real-time participant management, customizable meal orders, and detailed payment tracking. Simplifies the logistical nightmare of organizing a large-scale school event.

blackjack.title: Blackjack AI
blackjack.desc: Advanced card-counting AI developed as an intensive seminar course project. This Python-based application combines traditional card counting mathematics with real-time computer vision and image recognition to determine the statistically optimal game strategy dynamically.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Website
portfolio.desc: This modern web application, built from the ground up using React, TypeScript, and Vite. It features a custom ASCII renderer heavily leveraging Three.js to display a 3D STL skiing model entirely composed of dynamic code characters, blending my passions for coding and alpine sports.

schluesselerlebnis.title: Schlüsselerlebnis
schluesselerlebnis.desc: An immersive, browser-based escape room adventure and IT puzzle platform developed natively using Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Built during my internship at SSC-Services to evaluate applicants' technical problem-solving skills, it requires players to solve logic puzzles, decrypt hidden codes, and piece together clues to find their way out.

a2026.title: 2nd Place German Ski League
a2026.desc: Defended second place in the team standings of the German Ski League.

a2025.title: 2nd Place German Ski League
a2025.desc: Major success at the national level.

seibelseckle.title: Ski Team Seibelseckle
seibelseckle.desc: Training and competitions with the Ski Team Seibelseckle.

ssvNord.title: SSV Nord District
ssvNord.desc: Joined at age 6. Over a decade of race training foundation.

dhbw.title: Dual Studies in Business Informatics
dhbw.desc: Dual study program with hands-on software development experience.

sportStall.title: Minijob Cashier & Sales
sportStall.desc: Cashiering and customer service in winter sports retail.

ssc.title: Internship
ssc.desc: Built an IT puzzle platform for applicant testing with JavaScript and Node.js.

gww.title: Social Internship
gww.desc: Working with people with disabilities in social institutions.
